tools.name: importApplicationUsage.postOperation
tools.description:
Ingests application usage data from Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3).

The data must already exist in the S3 location. As part of the action, AWS Application Cost Profiler copies the object from your S3 bucket to an S3 bucket owned by Amazon for processing asynchronously.

tools.name: reportDefinition.deleteReportDefinition
tools.description: Deletes the specified report definition in AWS Application Cost Profiler. This stops the report from being generated.

tools.name: reportDefinition.getReportDefinition
tools.description: Retrieves the definition of a report already configured in AWS Application Cost Profiler.

tools.name: reportDefinition.listReportDefinitions
tools.description:
Retrieves a list of all reports and their configurations for your AWS account.

The maximum number of reports is one.

tools.name: reportDefinition.putReportDefinition
tools.description: Creates the report definition for a report in Application Cost Profiler.

tools.name: reportDefinition.updateReportDefinition
tools.description: Updates existing report in AWS Application Cost Profiler.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
